_note: Jordan-Wigner 반교환관계 보존 독립검증(EXACT) + Z-string teeth + be_hop 대조. 봉인=be_hop(fermionic hopping block-encoding). 시간발전=observation(INV-Q3).

observation.consumer_link: be_hop → QSVT/Trotter Hamiltonian sim(V08_14, e^{-iHt} 근사=observation)
observation.honest_boundary: JW 반교환 보존=EXACT(수학 항등식). 봉인=be_hop. e^{-iHt} 시간발전=observation(INV-Q3).
